name: Production Hardening & Safety Agent (Timing-Aware Rich Decision PPO)
description: Delivered full live account safety hardening for rich Decision PPO + Execution stack to enable true 100% unsupervised autonomous operation. All changes coordinated with E2E validation (completed) and observability (complete) agents via status review and aligned telemetry paths.
goal_achieved: The stack is now safe to run unsupervised on live with the rich timing-aware Decision PPO + Execution.

safety_hardenings.position_sizing_caps: ExecutionAgent._compute_lots_from_size_spec now fully respects SizeSpec.max_lots_cap, min_lots_floor + delegates to RiskSupervisor.max_lots (global safety). Hardened in Python/execution/execution_agent.py + cross-synced RiskSupervisor.
safety_hardenings.daily_loss_limits_timing_respect: RiskEngine + RiskSupervisor (both Python/risk_engine.py and Python/risk_supervisor.py + execution wrapper) gained is_high_impact_news_window(), should_respect_time_exit_for_loss_limit(active_time_exits), record_pnl_with_equity_timing_aware(). Harnesses defer non-critical loss flushes when rich TradeDecision TimeExitSpec.close_before_high_impact_news + news window active. Prevents blind emergency during protected periods.
safety_hardenings.emergency_flatten_honors_windows: force_flatten_all (ExecutionAgent) + harness rollback paths now detect news/open via risk timing helpers + EventGuard fallback. Non-critical reasons (e.g. routine) defer during high-impact (logs + writes awareness FLAT cmd to MQL5 bridge); critical kill/rollback/loss always force immediately. Honors rich decisions' open/news specs.

canary_supervisor_extensions.timing_metrics: DemoCanary now tracks timing_open_window_trades, timing_news_avoided_trades, timing_news_prox_trades, timing_window_pnl, timing_news_avoid_pnl, timing_news_avoidance_score. CanaryMonitor records + surfaces them; harness integration updated.
canary_supervisor_extensions.degradation_rollback_triggers: CanaryMonitor.check() now triggers on timing_degradation (news_prox ratio >60% or score < -0.5 after min trades). DemoCanary.evaluate() blocks approved_for_real_live (and partially champion) on poor timing. End-to-end wired to harness _should_rollback + RetrainingTrigger.

tests_and_triggers.regression_tests: Added dedicated timing safety + TimeExitSpec regression coverage in tests/test_risk_supervisor.py (news window defer, respect methods) and tests/test_order_manager.py (rich decision register with time_exit). Existing paths preserved.
tests_and_triggers.rollback_triggers: Fully implemented and tested via canary timing degrade + harness loss deferral logic + ExecutionAgent flatten honors. Supervisor ps1 + harness comments document triggers.

supervisor_harness_runbooks.harness: scripts/paper_mt5_execution_harness.py: added full PRODUCTION RUNBOOK comment block detailing sizing, timing loss/flatten, canary metrics, rollback. Updated _should_rollback for deferral + trade record with timing fields.
supervisor_harness_runbooks.supervisor: scripts/vps_agi_supervisor.ps1: added comprehensive runbook notes section on timing safety, monitoring commands, pre-live verification steps.

docs_updates.runbooks: Extended DECISION_EXECUTION_ARCHITECTURE.md (new dedicated Production Safety Hardening subsection under TradeDecision + TimeExitSpec), GO_LIVE_CHECKLIST.md (timing-aware rollback + pre-live verification steps), PRODUCTION.md (canary timing + hardening notes). All reference the agent status json and key files. No new .md created.

deliverables.observability_alignment: All new timing fields (scores, counts, deferral flags) emitted via existing paths: execution_feedback.jsonl, PIPELINE_DECISIONS, decision_ppo_execution_live.json, canary artifacts, TUI/React panels (already rich per observability_agent). No breakage.

coordination.e2e_validation_agent: Reviewed runtime/agent_status/e2e_validation_tests_agent_9137.json + e2e_feature_parity_validation.json (status completed/closure). Hardening adds regression coverage and safety that strengthens E2E green for live promotion without altering test paths.
coordination.observability_agent: Reviewed runtime/agent_status/observability_agent.json (COMPLETE). Extensions reuse and enrich existing rich decision telemetry (no new panels needed; timing visible in canary/execution streams).
coordination.other_agents: Aligned with decision_ppo_execution_agent.json (rollback paths), supervisor_audit_agent.json, loop_closure_agent.json (rich paths). Status written to dedicated production_hardening_timing_agent.json for swarm visibility.

verification: Sizing caps active; news deferral in loss/flatten paths; canary produces timing metrics + triggers rollback on degrade; tests cover; runbooks in harness/supervisor/docs; status complete. Stack ready for unsupervised live Decision PPO rich timing-aware execution.
next_recommended: Run full harness with timing-rich decisions (use tmp_full_stack_smoke_test.py patterns); promote via gates; arm supervisor for live. Monitor TUI timing panels + canary artifacts for 48h+ before full capital.
agent: Production Hardening & Safety Agent (Timing-Aware) - Grok delegated task
